title: TEST.jar
description:
There is a glitch in your worlds code you are playing a new beta version of minecraft that came out strange things are happening like a infection of some static block and creatures are in your world

Credits to mark 101 for inspiring me
body:
# **_THE WORLD IS STATIC_**

# ABOUT
This is a mod inspired by the mark101 youtube series it is a horror mod that is your warning. The mod contains various unreleased mobs that a company was developing with mojang, some entities are docil and mean no harm while others actively look for you. Static being one of them, they may seem scared but they are one of the most deadly ones. Theres a block that spawns around taking the entire world with it, replacing blocks around it.



# Informations

## Contacts and community
If you want to give suggestions or just interact with us or other members you can join us in discord [join here](https://discord.gg/A8NgduBTcH)

## Development
This mod is still in a very early version of development and we might take some time to develop the mod as we have alot of stuff to do (outside of the mod)

## What are we working on right now
We are completly remaking the mod you wont be able to play on the same world after the next updste
